arts.ttl: Newcastle United CEO reveals PIF's plan for 2025 with new face expected
arts.sum: Newcastle United chief executive Darren Eales has indicated that the club's search for a new CEO will not affect the Magpies' performance in the January transfer window. Eales, speaking at the We Are United event last week, said: "I mentioned at the time I had a notice period so the intention is it is business as usual.

arts.ttl: Arsenal still monitoring Alexander Isak situation
arts.sum: Arsenal are still monitoring the situation of Alexander Isak as the club look to sign a striker. Isak is one of the leading names on Arsenal’s shortlist of potential options and the Gunners are keeping a close eye on the forward’s situation at Newcastle. Despite discussions over a new deal at St James’ Park, there […] The post Arsenal still monitoring Alexander Isak situation first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Isak a throwback to Shearer but NUFC's forgotten star Willock is man to surprise
arts.sum: Super Swede Alexander Isak is the undoubted goal king of Newcastle United, number one marksman and go-to guy as a potential match winner. Landmarks lie ahead for two other defenders: Fabian Schar will make his 200th appearance in all competitions while new England right-back Tino Livramento will reach a half-century of league and cup outings.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's remarkable attacking statement Eddie Howe would love to make evoking Keegan
arts.sum: When asked if the defensive structures of Premier League teams in the modern game mean it would be too difficult to emulate such a stunning set of attacking statistics, Howe accepted that creating chances has became harder over the years. That's a major contrast to last term when Howe's team blasted in 85 goals in total in the Premier League, with only Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester City managing more.

arts.ttl: Julen Lopetugui to gamble with West Ham selection at Newcastle United after sack expectation
arts.sum: West Ham United manager Julen Lopetegui is facing an uncertain future as his side travel to face Newcastle United on Monday night. West Ham have only recorded three league wins so far this term against Crystal Palace, Ipswich Town and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: David Moyes emerges as frontrunner to replace Steve Cooper at Leicester City
arts.sum: The veteran manager could be set for a return to management following Steve Cooper's sacking yesterday.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs West Ham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle are aiming to continue their impressive recent form when West Ham visit St James’ Park on Monday evening. Eddie Howe’s side have won back-to-back games to boost their European ambitions and can climb into the top six with another win tonight. Here is all you need to know about the clash. arts.ttl: Newcastle United confident they can sign free agent 4x Champions League winner
arts.sum: Newcastle United had a quiet summer transfer window and they could look to make new additions in the January transfer window. The Magpies struggled with financial issues in the summer and had to sell players in order to comply with PSR. arts.sum: Newcastle host West Ham tonight to round off the weekend’s Premier League action. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for both team...
